programme.title: Buongiorno Benessere
programme.desc: Vira Carbone conduce il settimanale dedicato a medicina, salute e benessere, trattati con un linguaggio semplice e diretto.

programme.title: Linea Verde Illumina - Sport e Salute
programme.desc: In collaborazione con Sport e Salute, il programma dedicato all'attivita sportiva e ai corretti stili di vita. Un viaggio attraverso tante regioni italiane, con i leggendari personaggi dello sport italiano. L'Emilia-Romagna e protagonista della decima puntata: Francesco Gasparri, Andrea Lucchetta, Valerio Vermiglio e Andrea Minguzzi, ci accompagnano in vari istituti scolastici protagonisti dei progetti Scuola Attiva Kids e Scuola Attiva Infanzia di Sport e Salute, mentre Elisa Silvestrin e con la campionessa di pattinaggio a rotelle Luana Pilia.

programme.title: Linea Verde Discovery
programme.desc: Federico Quaranta racconta il piccolo miracolo del Salento, il tacco d'Italia, che, pressoché sconosciuto all'estero fino all'inizio del nuovo millennio, e oggi una delle destinazioni piu ambite dal turismo internazionale. Alla crisi della piccola agricoltura gli abitanti di questo territorio hanno risposto con nuove idee, progetti e coraggio. Le vecchie masserie si sono evolute e oggi aprono le porte al turismo enogastronomico ma anche alla cultura, all'arte, alla bellezza della natura e alle iniziative di rigenerazione sociale. Si parla anche del ruolo degli artigiani che, recuperando antiche tradizioni, oggi esportano i loro prodotti in tutto il mondo.

programme.title: Linea Verde Italia
programme.desc: Il viaggio di "Linea Verde Italia" prosegue alla scoperta dei tesori nascosti e delle eccellenze del Belpaese facendo tappa nel cuore pulsante della Toscana: Monica Caradonna e Tinto sono a Lucca, una citta dove la storia millenaria convive in perfetta armonia con una visione moderna e sostenibile del futuro. Il percorso inizia tra le storiche mura lucchesi, esplorando un equilibrio unico tra uomo e natura. Arte e artigianato d'eccellenza, e non solo. Lucca e anche la terra che ha dato i natali a Giacomo Puccini e, nell'anno in cui ricorre il centenario della famosa opera Turandot, il programma rende omaggio alla sua musica immortale. Una citta ricca di storia, ma anche dinamica e aperta al futuro: il racconto si snoda attraverso le iniziative cittadine che promuovono lo sport, la vivibilita degli spazi urbani e il vivace universo dei cosplayer e della cultura pop, che hanno reso il capoluogo un punto di riferimento internazionale per le nuove generazioni. Il viaggio si sposta poi verso Pietrasanta, per approfondire la prestigiosa candidatura della citta a Capitale italiana dell'arte contemporanea. Un progetto che premia decenni di fecondo dialogo tra artisti di fama mondiale e i maestri artigiani locali, capaci di trasformare materia grezza in opere d'arte di altissima qualita. Per concludere, Linea Verde Italia si immerge nella natura incontaminata del Lago di Massaciuccoli. Un'incursione dedicata alla straordinaria biodiversita di quest'area protetta, per scoprire i progetti e le tecnologie messe in campo oggi per preservare un ecosistema cosi fragile e prezioso. Il programma e stato realizzato in collaborazione con il Ministero della Cultura - Dipartimento per le attivita culturali.

programme.title: Tg1
programme.desc: Da San Severino Marche, la cerimonia per l'81° Anniversario della Liberazione d'Italia, alla presenza del Sergio Mattarella e delle alte cariche dello Stato.

programme.title: Bar Centrale
programme.desc: Elisa Isoardi commenta l'attualita in compagnia di ospiti in studio e in collegamento da bar e circoli di paese.

programme.title: Passaggio a Nord Ovest
programme.desc: In questa puntata visitiamo il Lago Hillier, al largo delle coste sud-occidentali dell'Australia. Uno specchio d'acqua conosciuto per la sua tonalita rosa. Con Alberto Angela ci trasferiamo in Sicilia, per visitare lungo la costa che va da Trapani a Marsala la Riserva Naturale Orientata Saline di Trapani e Paceco. Per la rubrica Passaggio in Volo sorvoliamo l'isola di San Giulio, sul Lago d'Orta in Piemonte e la Fortezza di San Leo, nel cuore della Romagna. Ci rechiamo in Piemonte e precisamente a Gignese, una rinomata localita che collega il Lago Maggiore e il Lago d'Orta. L'arazzo di Bayeux racconta la storia di Guglielmo il Conquistatore, duca di Normandia e la battaglia di Hastings del 1066.

programme.title: A Sua immagine
programme.desc: Lorena Bianchetti in studio, racconta storie di coraggio, in un viaggio alla scoperta del senso della vita. Nella seconda parte commento liturgico al Vangelo del Mons. Dario Edorardo Viganó- Conduce Lorena Bianchetti.

programme.title: A Sua immagine
programme.desc: Lorena Bianchetti intervista Franco Miseria, uno dei piu grandi coreografi della storia televisiva. L'occasione per rivedere momenti indimenticabili della tivu del passato e per ripercorrere le tappe salienti di una carriera per molti versi inimitabile. Un racconto intimo volto a svelare i suoi valori, la sua fede cristiana, i momenti belli e quelli difficili della sua vita. Paolo Balduzzi incontra un personaggio legatissimo a Franco Miseria sia sul piano umano che professionale, Lucio Presta. Per "Le Ragioni della Speranza", seconda parte del programma, prosegue il viaggio nei santuari mariani. La puntata e ambientata a Catania, nel Santuario di Santa Maria dell'Aiuto, punto di riferimento della devozione catanese, nato attorno a una venerata immagine ritenuta miracolosa e divenuto nei secoli luogo simbolico della spiritualita cittadina.

programme.title: Linea Verde
programme.desc: Con i suoi borghi medievali dove il tempo sembra essere sospeso, una natura ancora integra e tanti prodotti di eccellenza, la Valnerina, cuore pulsante dell'Umbria, e la protagonista della puntata: Peppone Calabrese, Fabio Gallo e Margherita Granbassi iniziano il loro viaggio dal paese di Cerreto di Spoleto legato alla storica figura del "ciarlatano" per poi andare a conoscere alcuni prodotti identitari che nascono dalla perfetta sinergia con il territorio e la sua storia millenaria. La tradizione della pastorizia e la produzione del pecorino a latte crudo ad Apagni, l'arte della norcineria che ha dato vita ad un'eccellenza come il Prosciutto di Norcia e che si lega all'antichissima Scuola di Chirurgia di Preci, fondata dai Monaci Benedettini dell'Abbazia di Sant' Eutizio, dove ci si esercitava anche sulle carni suine per sperimentare nuove tecniche, la lavorazione della pasta fresca e altre storie di cibo e comunita sono alcune delle tappe del percorso di Peppone. Fabio Gallo racconta invece lo sviluppo della troticoltura, uno dei pilastri dell'economia della valle, grazie alla presenza del fiume Nera, l'affascinante storia della lavorazione della canapa a Sant'Anatolia di Narco e la coltivazione e preparazione di legumi antichi di montagna come la roveja, riscoperta per caso in una cantina da un'appassionata agricoltrice. Terra di grandi prodotti ma anche luogo di silenzio e profonda spiritualita, la Valnerina nasconde suggestivi tesori come l'eremo della Madonna della Stella scavato nella roccia e risalente al 1300. Qui arriva Margherita Ganbassi dopo aver raccontato la secolare tradizione delle erbe selvatiche a Sellano. Finale a tavola a Vallo di Nera, uno dei "borghi piu belli d'Italia", per assaggiare i prodotti raccontati e condividere il pranzo della domenica con la piccola comunita locale.

programme.title: Cinque Minuti
programme.desc: Bruno Vespa racconta l'Italia e il mondo attraverso interviste a personaggi della politica interna e internazionale, del mondo artistico, culturale e dello spettacolo per approfondire le notizie giorno per giorno.

programme.title: Affari tuoi
programme.desc: Stefano De Martino conduce "Affari tuoi": 20 concorrenti, uno per regione d'Italia, sfidano la fortuna e il "Dottore" per trovare il pacco contenente 300.000 euro.

programme.title: Ulisse: il piacere della scoperta
programme.desc: Vi raccontiamo di Lucrezia Borgia, una delle donne piu controverse del rinascimento. Assassina, avvelenatrice, figlia e sorella incestuosa. Tante le accuse che danno corpo alla sua leggenda nera. Nata dal cardinale Rodrigo, divenuto poi papa Alessandro VI e sorella di Cesare Borgia. Cosa c'e di vero nelle tante vicende che l'hanno messa in cattiva luce? E la domanda alla quale Alberto Angela cerchera di rispondere ripercorrendo la vicenda tormentata di una donna in realta forte, intraprendente, padrona del proprio destino al di la delle apparenze. Di Alberto Angela.

programme.title: Tg1
programme.desc: Da San Severino Marche, la cerimonia per l'81° Anniversario della Liberazione d'Italia, alla presenza del Sergio Mattarella e delle alte cariche dello Stato.

programme.title: Viaje Al Centro De La Tele
programme.desc: VIAJE A TRAVÉS DEL ARCHIVO DE TVE, EN EL QUE PODEMOS VER LOS CAMBIOS OCURRIDOS EN LA SOCIEDAD ESPANOLA.

programme.title: Saber Y Ganar Fin De Semana
Aqui La Tierra
programme.desc: Magacine de naturaleza e información meteorológica.

programme.title: Metropolis
programme.desc: Przyszłość. Ludzie są podzieleni na dwie grupy: myślicieli, którzy stwarzają plany (ale nie wiedzą jak wszystko działa), oraz robotników, którzy wytwarzają (ale nie mają żadnej wizji). Są od siebie kompletnie odseparowani, ale razem tworzą jednak całość. Jeden człowiek z grupy myślicieli ośmiela się odwiedzić podziemia, gdzie robotnicy wykonują trudną pracę. Jest bardzo zdziwiony tym, co zobaczył...

programme.title: La Promesa
programme.desc: Jana está sola en el mundo y todo es culpa de los Marqueses de Luján, pero ha llegado el momento de vengarse y de encontrar a su hermano.

programme.title: Wild spirits h2o: wild spirits h2o #
programme.desc: Offering the very best extreme water action, featuring highlights from the most extreme and wettest sporting events in the world, including surfing, wakeboarding, kite and wind surfing. Wild Spirits H20 features rider profiles, interviews, highlights, and all things water based!

programme.title: Wild spirits h2o: wild spirits h2o #
programme.desc: Offering the very best extreme water action, featuring highlights from the most extreme and wettest sporting events in the world, including surfing, wakeboarding, kite and wind surfing. Wild Spirits H20 features rider profiles, interviews, highlights, and all things water based!

programme.title: Better than four: better than four #
programme.desc: Initially a bi-weekly (26×26') sports series with a difference, 'Better Than Four' brings viewers all the action from all things two-wheeled. As well as profiling past, present and future heroes of cycling, 'Better Than Four' includes news features and highlights from the very latest events. Each episode is also packed with tips and tricks to try at home, as well as reviews of the latest kit, equipment and cycling films. Changing gears from traditional cycling coverage, 'Better Than Four' takes viewers to new, exotic locations, from the volcano bike-ride in Bali to jungle biking around the Mayan temples of South America. Each episode will include up to 3 segments covering cycling and biking events from all over the world. With amazing footage and commentary from experienced cyclists, daredevil skills and awe-inspiring camerawork, this groundbreaking show is a must for cycling enthusiasts and novices alike.

programme.title: Inside sailing 2019: inside sailing 2019 #
programme.desc: Inside Sailing contains highlights from top sailing and yachting events around the world. It is a documentary show which educates the audience about the secrets of sailing, presents several exciting sea-side locations and offers a flavor of yachting lifestyle.

programme.title: Cape epic 2022: cape epic 2022 #
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world's premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through roughly 700km of unspoilt scenery and 15 000m of accumulated climbing, over some of the most magnificent mountain passes in Western Cape in South Africa. The Absa Cape Epic is the most televised mountain bike stage race in the world and the only eight-day mountain bike stage race classed as hors catégorie by the Union Cycliste Internationale (UCI). This official UCI status makes it a highlight on the professional racer's calendar. The Absa Cape Epic also attracts aspiring amateur riders wanting to test themselves against the best. It is a full-service race, meaning that everything is taken care of from the start - all riders need to think about is riding.

programme.title: Speed catamarans gc32 2021: speed catamarans gc32 2021_
programme.desc: After making their debut in indomitable style in 2014, the unique flying catamarans literally "took off" on their first European Circuit in 2015. Building on the success of the America's Cup foiling catamarans, the GC32 takes the thrill of foiling to an extraordinary performance level in a fiercely fought five stage circuit raced across five iconic venues in Italy, Spain and France.

programme.title: Speed catamarans gc32 2021: speed catamarans gc32 2021_

programme.title: Kite master: kite master_
programme.desc: Kite Masters is the brand new series showcasing the latest news from the inspirational world of kite boarding - the action packed sport which continues to take the world by storm. Whether you are a kiteboarder - competitor or recreational, kiteboarding fan, interested observer or have ever wanted to give kiteboarding a go, then you are guaranteed to enjoy the Kite Masters series. There are a myriad of different disciplines in kiteboarding - racing to freestyle - for weekend warriors and the professional riders. Kite Masters checks in on them all and brings you the best round up of action from around the world.

programme.title: Boat show 4k: boat show 4k e12
programme.desc: The Boat Show is a program dedicated to nautical lovers, boat owners, or dreamers, like ourselves. The Boat Show covers water tests, reports from international boat shows, visits to shipyards, boat maintenance and technology, everyday boat repair and maintenance tips, races, events, celebrities, cooking, safety, charters and ports. It is made with passion by a team of experts with more than 15 years of experience.

programme.title: Andalucia bike race 2019 #1
programme.desc: The Andalucia Bike Race is Spain's premier mountain bike race, and one of the most outstanding in the world as recognized by the Union Cycliste Internationale (UCI). Incorporating six stages over six days, the race weaves its way up and down the Andalucia mountains at a blistering pace, routing through spectacular trails and sensational views. Elite and masters race categories offer individual and team leader board standings, with daily stage prizes, overall medals and prize money for the elite UCI riders. The pace of the competition never slows across the six stages, kicking off with the stage 1 time trial; a short, fast and intense 'flash stage', featuring single tracks mixed with overtaking sections. Five days, 32 kilometres and over 6,590 meters of ascent later, the 57.8km 'finisher' stage 6 is the final test, as riders climb over 1,396 meters up the mythical Reventón and pass through Trasierra, before descending and finishing along Santo Domingo's unforgettable single-track trail. Riders choose their risks to secure an advantage, all the time fully conscious that one mistake navigating the rocky trails means their race is over. Winning thith edition of the Andalucia Bike Ra.

programme.title: Better than four: better than four #
programme.desc: Initially a bi-weekly (26×26') sports series with a difference, 'Better Than Four' brings viewers all the action from all things two-wheeled. As well as profiling past, present and future heroes of cycling, 'Better Than Four' includes news features and highlights from the very latest events. Each episode is also packed with tips and tricks to try at home, as well as reviews of the latest kit, equipment and cycling films. Changing gears from traditional cycling coverage, 'Better Than Four' takes viewers to new, exotic locations, from the volcano bike-ride in Bali to jungle biking around the Mayan temples of South America. Each episode will include up to 3 segments covering cycling and biking events from all over the world. With amazing footage and commentary from experienced cyclists, daredevil skills and awe-inspiring camerawork, this groundbreaking show is a must for cycling enthusiasts and novices alike.

programme.title: Xterra adventure - 2020: xterra adventure - 2020 #
programme.desc: XTERRA is the world's premier off-road multisport event. An extreme competition, the XTERRA format combines swimming with mountain biking and trail running. It has been described as one part triathlon, one part mountain bike race, and one part "survival of the fittest". The typical distances are a 1.5k swim, 30k mountain bike, and 10k trail run.

programme.title: Sports adventure: sports adventure #6010
programme.desc: Sports Adventure Episode 610: Ultra-Running the Globe. A broad look at the way in which ultra-running has enticed a new audience to appreciate some of the world's most extreme environments, whether it's the deserts of Oman in the Middle East, the majesty of Europe's Alps or the rugged, winding trails of the Balearic Islands in Spain.

programme.title: Sports adventure: sports adventure #6010

programme.title: Sports adventure: sports adventure #6011
programme.desc: Sports Adventure Episode 611: Fish River Ultra (Desert Ultra Marathon). 161 km long, 27 km wide and up to 550 meters deep...the Fish River Canyon in Namibia is the World Wonder you've never heard of - second only to the Grand Canyon in terms of its sheer immensity and often closed to tourists due to the extreme heat, it's nevertheless the playground of the ultra-runner - 100 km through an environment that's as harsh as it is breathtakingly beautiful.

programme.title: Outdoor sports show 2019: outdoor sports show 2019 #
programme.desc: Following a successful first run, The Outdoor Sports Show has returned on screens in early 2018, by showcasing a diverse array of outdoor sports destined to reach again millions of audiences globally. There are no limits to the content of the Outdoor Sports Show, which covers everything, from professional and recreational to the extreme and adventure sports. From marathon races to climbing, skiing to surfing, hiking to triathlon, sailing to cycling - human meets nature on a thrilling journey of performance.

programme.title: Cape epic 2022: cape epic 2022 #
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world's premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through roughly 700km of unspoilt scenery and 15 000m of accumulated climbing, over some of the most magnificent mountain passes in Western Cape in South Africa. The Absa Cape Epic is the most televised mountain bike stage race in the world and the only eight-day mountain bike stage race classed as hors catégorie by the Union Cycliste Internationale (UCI). This official UCI status makes it a highlight on the professional racer's calendar. The Absa Cape Epic also attracts aspiring amateur riders wanting to test themselves against the best. It is a full-service race, meaning that everything is taken care of from the start - all riders need to think about is riding.

Building on the success of the America's Cup foiling catamarans, the GC32 takes the thrill of foiling to an extraordinary performance level in a fiercely fought five stage circuit raced across five iconic venues in Italy, Spain and France.

programme.title: Kite master: kite master_
programme.desc: Kite Masters is the brand new series showcasing the latest news from the inspirational world of kite boarding - the action packed sport which continues to take the world by storm. Whether you are a kiteboarder - competitor or recreational, kiteboarding fan, interested observer or have ever wanted to give kiteboarding a go, then you are guaranteed to enjoy the Kite Masters series. There are a myriad of different disciplines in kiteboarding - racing to freestyle - for weekend warriors and the professional riders. Kite Masters checks in on them all and brings you the best round up of action from around the world.

programme.title: Outdoor sports show 2019: outdoor sports show 2019 #
programme.desc: Following a successful first run, The Outdoor Sports Show has returned on screens in early 2018, by showcasing a diverse array of outdoor sports destined to reach again millions of audiences globally. There are no limits to the content of the Outdoor Sports Show, which covers everything, from professional and recreational to the extreme and adventure sports. From marathon races to climbing, skiing to surfing, hiking to triathlon, sailing to cycling - human meets nature on a thrilling journey of performance.

programme.title: Xterra adventure - 2020: xterra adventure - 2020 #
programme.desc: XTERRA is the world's premier off-road multisport event. An extreme competition, the XTERRA format combines swimming with mountain biking and trail running. It has been described as one part triathlon, one part mountain bike race, and one part "survival of the fittest". The typical distances are a 1.5k swim, 30k mountain bike, and 10k trail run.

programme.title: Cape epic 2022: cape epic 2022 #
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world's premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through roughly 700km of unspoilt scenery and 15 000m of accumulated climbing, over some of the most magnificent mountain passes in Western Cape in South Africa. The Absa Cape Epic is the most televised mountain bike stage race in the world and the only eight-day mountain bike stage race classed as hors catégorie by the Union Cycliste Internationale (UCI). This official UCI status makes it a highlight on the professional racer's calendar. The Absa Cape Epic also attracts aspiring amateur riders wanting to test themselves against the best. It is a full-service race, meaning that everything is taken care of from the start - all riders need to think about is riding.

programme.title: Better than four: better than four #
programme.desc: Initially a bi-weekly (26×26') sports series with a difference, 'Better Than Four' brings viewers all the action from all things two-wheeled. As well as profiling past, present and future heroes of cycling, 'Better Than Four' includes news features and highlights from the very latest events. Each episode is also packed with tips and tricks to try at home, as well as reviews of the latest kit, equipment and cycling films. Changing gears from traditional cycling coverage, 'Better Than Four' takes viewers to new, exotic locations, from the volcano bike-ride in Bali to jungle biking around the Mayan temples of South America. Each episode will include up to 3 segments covering cycling and biking events from all over the world. With amazing footage and commentary from experienced cyclists, daredevil skills and awe-inspiring camerawork, this groundbreaking show is a must for cycling enthusiasts and novices alike.

programme.title: Sports max: sports max #
programme.desc: Sports Max highlights the latest extreme and alternative sports from around the globe, including mountain biking, surfing, snowboarding, kiteboarding, skateboarding, rock climbing, kayaking, skydiving, freeskiing, freestyle motocross, BMX, extreme big mountain skiing & snowboarding, parkour and many more.

programme.title: Paragliding world cup #1
programme.desc: The Paragliding World Cup Superfinal was staged in Roldanillo, Colombia with ten days of high level competition flying in one of the best paragliding venues in the world. One-hundred and twenty-two pilots competed, including 18 previous overall World Cup winners and 12 Women World Cup winners, ranking it as one of the toughest line-ups ever to face each other. Suspended in the air, this adventure sport features cross-country racing, with pilots needing to be an expert in understanding the impact of terrain on weather conditions.

programme.title: Hankook 24h serie: hankook 24h serie #
programme.desc: The 2022 24H GT Series powered by Hankook was the eighth season of the 24H Series with drivers battling for championship points and titles and the thirteenth season since Creventic, the organiser and promoter of the series, organised multiple races a year. The races were contested with GT3-spec cars, GT4-spec cars, sports cars and 24H-Specials, like silhouette cars.
